title: WedDecor Oval Foldable Laundry Basket 16L Collapsible Plastic Floral Laundry Basket Sturdy Folding Washing Bin Basket Clothes Storage Multi Purpose Container for Bedroom, Laundry, Grey
features: SIZE: The laundry basket measures in size 50cm x 37.5cm x 27cm - 16L. which is good enough to store up your clothes or any other things

PREMIUM QUALITY: Excellently manufactured washing baskets from strong, premium thermo-plastic rubber. It is quite safe to handle this basket. Use them with confidence knowing that they are strong and long-lasting. Offered its durability, this basket will last for many years.

EXCELLENT SPACE SAVING: When not in use, this collapsible laundry basket effortlessly folds flat for simple storage. After folding, it can be place anywhere like under the bed or laundry storage room, saving almost 70% of storage space.

COMFORTABLE GRIP HANDLES: Our washing basket is your greatest comfort has been taken into consideration when designing our washing basket. Each basket has grip handles on either side so you can carry it about your house easily and without hurting your hands. The weight of the basket is distributed more evenly thanks to its design.

VERSATILE USE - Our laundry basket is quite adaptable and may be used for a variety of different purposes all around house. Keep a few of our laundry baskets about your house to store and manage different household things, such as toys for kids, household equipment, blankets, pet food, gardening equipment, and much more!
